name: SG 553 | 擎天神
descriptionEn: The terrorist-exclusive SG553 is a premium scoped alternative to the AK47 for effective long-range engagement. It has been given a modern camouflage hydrographic. It was once a design earmarked for the Coalition Taskforce, but Huxley engaged in corporate espionage to make it a Phoenix exclusive
descriptionZh: T专用的 SG553 是一把适用于远距离交战的 AK47 替代品。 这把武器采用了现代迷彩涂装。 它原本是为联合特遣队特别设计，但从事商业间谍活动的赫胥黎将它变成了凤凰战士专属
